name: 1Kosmos

when_not_to_use: B2B SaaS with trusted enterprise clients

review.verdict: Best for fintech requiring identity verification. 1Kosmos offers subscription.
pros: Generous free tier for getting started
cons: B2B SaaS with trusted enterprise clients

lock_in.reason: Proprietary identity platform with DID claims, switching requires re-onboarding

transparency.reason: Subscription pricing but enterprise details behind sales

developer_experience.reason: REST APIs and mobile SDKs, docs available but complex
